Title: Hello, Goodbye and Everything in Between
Writer: Amy Reed, Ben York Jones, Jennifer E. Smith
Actors: Jordan Fisher, Talia Ryder, Ayo Edebiri
Plot: Claire and Aidan who after making a pact that they would break up before college, find themselves retracing the steps of their relationship on their last evening as a couple. The epic date leads them to familiar landmarks, unexpected places, and causes them to question whether high school love is meant to last.
